name: Caffè Latte
description: Rich, full-bodied espresso blended with steamed milk and topped with a thin layer of foam.

name: Caffè Mocha
description: Rich, full-bodied espresso combined with bittersweet mocha sauce, steamed milk and topped with sweetened whipped cream.

name: White Chocolate Mocha
description: Espresso combined with white chocolate sauce and steamed milk, topped with sweetened whipped cream.

name: Caramel Macchiato
description: Freshly steamed milk with vanilla-flavored syrup marked with espresso and topped with a caramel drizzle.

name: Flat White
description: Smooth ristretto shots of espresso with velvety steamed whole milk.

name: Caffè Americano
description: Espresso shots topped with hot water create a light layer of crema.

name: Cappuccino
description: Dark, rich espresso under a thick layer of steamed and lightly textured foam.

name: Blonde Vanilla Latte
description: Blonde espresso with steamed milk and vanilla syrup for a lighter, smoother latte.

name: Pike Place Roast
description: A smooth, medium roast with rich flavor and subtle notes of cocoa and toasted nuts.

name: Blonde Roast
description: A lighter, gentler take on the Starbucks roast — mellow and soft with a subtle sweetness.

name: Cinnamon Dolce Latte
description: Espresso, steamed milk and cinnamon dolce-flavored syrup topped with sweetened whipped cream and cinnamon dolce topping.

name: Iced Caffè Latte
description: Espresso combined with cold milk and poured over ice.

name: Iced Caramel Macchiato
description: Vanilla-flavored syrup, cold milk, espresso and caramel drizzle over ice.

name: Iced White Chocolate Mocha
description: White chocolate sauce, espresso and cold milk poured over ice, topped with sweetened whipped cream.

name: Cold Brew
description: Handcrafted in small batches daily, slow-steeped for 20 hours for a super-smooth flavor.

name: Vanilla Sweet Cream Cold Brew
description: Slow-steeped cold brew topped with a delicate float of house-made vanilla sweet cream.

name: Iced Brown Sugar Oatmilk Shaken Espresso
description: Blonde espresso, brown sugar and cinnamon shaken together and topped with oatmilk.

name: Iced Caffè Americano
description: Espresso shots topped with cold water, served over ice.

name: Caramel Frappuccino
description: Buttery caramel syrup blended with coffee, milk and ice, topped with whipped cream and caramel drizzle.

name: Mocha Frappuccino
description: Rich mocha sauce blended with coffee, milk and ice, topped with sweetened whipped cream.

name: Java Chip Frappuccino
description: Mocha sauce, Frappuccino chips blended with coffee, milk and ice, topped with whipped cream and mocha drizzle.

name: Vanilla Bean Crème Frappuccino
description: Vanilla bean powder blended with milk and ice, topped with whipped cream.

name: Strawberries & Crème Frappuccino
description: Strawberry puree and vanilla syrup blended with milk and ice, topped with whipped cream.

name: Chai Tea Latte
description: Black tea infused with cinnamon, clove and other warming spices, combined with steamed milk.

name: Matcha Latte
description: Smooth and creamy matcha sweetened just right and served with steamed milk.

name: Iced Matcha Latte
description: Smooth and creamy matcha sweetened just right, combined with milk and served over ice.

name: Iced Chai Tea Latte
description: Black tea infused with cinnamon, clove and other warming spices, combined with milk and served over ice.

name: Earl Grey Tea
description: A robust black tea with fragrant bergamot citrus for a distinctive flavor.

name: Emperor's Clouds & Mist
description: A gently smoky, softly sweet green tea with a light body.

name: Mint Majesty
description: A blend of spearmint and peppermint — a refreshing herbal tea.

name: Iced Black Tea Lemonade
description: Premium black tea sweetened and shaken with ice and lemonade.

name: Iced Green Tea Lemonade
description: Green tea blended with mint, lemongrass and lemon verbena, shaken with lemonade and ice.

name: Iced Peach Green Tea Lemonade
description: Green tea shaken with peach-flavored juice blend, lemonade and ice.

name: Pink Drink
description: Strawberry Açaí Refreshers with accents of passionfruit and creamy coconutmilk.

name: Dragon Drink
description: Mango Dragonfruit Refreshers with creamy coconutmilk and real dragonfruit pieces.

name: Strawberry Açaí Refresher
description: Strawberry-flavored juice with accents of passionfruit, combined with real strawberry pieces.

name: Mango Dragonfruit Refresher
description: Tropical mango and dragonfruit flavors shaken with real dragonfruit pieces.

name: Lemonade
description: Fresh, hand-shaken lemonade made with real lemon juice and cane sugar.

name: Hot Chocolate
description: Steamed milk with mocha-flavored sauce and sweetened whipped cream.

name: White Hot Chocolate
description: Steamed milk with white chocolate sauce, topped with sweetened whipped cream.

name: Bacon, Gouda & Egg Sandwich
description: Applewood-smoked bacon, aged Gouda cheese and a peppered egg patty on an artisan roll.

name: Sausage, Cheddar & Egg Sandwich
description: Savory sausage patty, fluffy eggs and aged cheddar cheese on an English muffin.

name: Spinach, Feta & Egg White Wrap
description: Cage-free egg whites, spinach, feta cheese and sun-dried tomato cream cheese in a whole-wheat wrap.

name: Turkey Bacon, Cheddar & Egg White Sandwich
description: Turkey bacon, cage-free egg whites and reduced-fat white cheddar on a wheat English muffin.

name: Butter Croissant
description: Golden, flaky croissant made with real butter.

name: Chocolate Croissant
description: Light, flaky, all-butter croissant filled with chocolate batons.

name: Blueberry Muffin
description: A moist, tender muffin bursting with blueberries and topped with a crunchy streusel.

name: Cheese Danish
description: Flaky, golden pastry filled with sweet cream cheese.

name: Double Chocolate Chunk Brownie
description: Rich, fudgy brownie studded with chunks of dark and white chocolate.

name: Chocolate Chip Cookie
description: A classic cookie loaded with semi-sweet chocolate chips.

name: Birthday Cake Pop
description: Buttery cake mixed with buttercream, dipped in a pink chocolaty coating and topped with sprinkles.

name: Chocolate Cake Pop
description: Chocolate cake mixed with chocolate buttercream, dipped in dark chocolaty coating.

name: Tomato & Mozzarella Sandwich
description: Roasted tomatoes, mozzarella, spinach and basil pesto on focaccia bread.

name: Turkey Pesto Panini
description: Turkey, provolone cheese, roasted red peppers and basil pesto on ciabatta bread.

name: Ham & Swiss Panini
description: Ham and Swiss cheese with Dijon mustard on a toasted ciabatta roll.

name: Protein Box (Cheese & Fruit)
description: Brie, Gouda, two-year aged cheddar, crackers, grapes and apple slices.

name: Madeline
description: A soft, shell-shaped French cake with a delicate buttery flavor.
